hero.badge: Open Source · 100% Local · AEGIS Server Compatible
hero.title:
Your data stays
yours.
hero.sub: Aegis Personal auto-detects and masks personal information before it reaches AI chatbots. SSNs, credit cards, phone numbers, emails — protected in real time across ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and 25+ services.
demo.textBefore: My SSN is 123-45-6789 and email is john@company.com
demo.textAfter: My SSN is 482-91-3047 and email is user_a3f1@example.com
features.title:
PII protection that
just works
features.sub: Aegis Personal detects and masks your personal data before it ever reaches an AI model. Runs entirely in your browser.
features.pii.title: PII Auto-Detection & Masking
features.pii.desc: Detects SSNs, credit cards, emails, phone numbers, Korean RRN, passport numbers, and driver's licenses. Replaces them with realistic pseudonyms automatically.
features.dashboard.title: Real-Time Floating Dashboard
features.dashboard.desc: A draggable floating badge on every page shows your protection status live. Expand it to see scan history, server status, and PII detection details.
features.aegis.title: AEGIS Server Integration
features.aegis.desc: Connect to AEGIS for enterprise-grade analysis. Multi-endpoint server scanning with jailbreak detection, safety checks, text classification, and Korean text analysis.
features.silent.title: Silent by Default
features.silent.desc: No annoying popups. A subtle shield icon shows your status. Full alerts and blocking only when real threats are detected. You control the sensitivity.
features.lang.title: Multi-Language Support
features.lang.desc: Full interface in English, Korean, and Spanish. PII detection works across all languages including Korean-specific patterns like RRN and spacing manipulation.
features.reports.title: Weekly Protection Reports
features.reports.desc: See how many PII items were protected and scans performed. Track your protection history and share weekly summaries with one click.
howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.sub: PII protection in three steps. Zero configuration needed.
howItWorks.step1.title: You type normally
howItWorks.step1.desc: Use ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or any supported AI service as usual. Aegis Personal monitors your input silently in the background.
howItWorks.step2.title: PII is detected and masked
howItWorks.step2.desc: Before your message is sent, Aegis detects personal information and replaces it with realistic pseudonyms. SSNs become different SSNs, emails become different emails.
howItWorks.step3.title: AI responds, you see the original
howItWorks.step3.desc: The AI works with pseudonymized data. When it responds, Aegis automatically restores your real data in the chat display — seamless and invisible.
aegis.title:
Supercharge with
AEGIS Server
aegis.sub: Connect to the AEGIS cloud API for enterprise-grade analysis beyond local PII detection.
aegis.judgment.title: Judgment Engine
aegis.judgment.desc: Multi-layered risk analysis with confidence scoring. Approve, Block, Modify, Escalate — server-authoritative decisions.
aegis.jailbreak.title: Jailbreak Detection
aegis.jailbreak.desc: Pattern-matching and ML-powered jailbreak detection. Identifies prompt injection, role hijacking, and encoding attacks.
aegis.safety.title: Safety Check
aegis.safety.desc: Content safety scoring across multiple categories. Detects harmful, violent, sexual, and hateful content with category-level detail.
aegis.classify.title: Text Classification
aegis.classify.desc: Categorizes prompts by intent and topic. Identifies social engineering, data extraction, and manipulation attempts.
aegis.korean.title: Korean Text Analysis
aegis.korean.desc: Specialized analysis for Korean text. Detects chosung separation, spacing manipulation, and CJK-specific evasion techniques.
aegis.floating.title: Floating Dashboard
aegis.floating.desc: Real-time server status, scan results, and endpoint breakdowns — all visible in a draggable floating panel on every page.
sites.title: Works on 25+ AI services
sites.sub: Wherever you chat with AI, Aegis Personal protects your data.
pricing.title: Simple pricing
pricing.sub: Free local protection. Connect AEGIS for more.
pricing.pro.f3: AEGIS Server v2 — Jailbreak, Safety, Classify
cta.title:
Keep your personal data
out of AI models
cta.sub: Free. Open source. Installs in 10 seconds. Connect AEGIS for enterprise-grade protection.
